content:
# Recommendations ‚Äî after iter-034 (for the iter-035 plan agent)

## TOP PRIORITY ‚Äî close (A) `moduleTensorPowAdd_assoc` (1 iter, CONVERGING)
The full proof is banked in `task_results/AlgebraicJacobian-Picard-SectionGradedRing.md` (section
"(A) moduleTensorPowAdd_assoc ‚Äî RESOLVED-MODULO-ONE-STEP"). It compiles through `rw [hhex]` (step 3).
Dispatch the prover to **paste it back and close ONLY step (4)**: commute `Œ≤_a = Œ≤_{L^i,F}` past the
inner merge `Œº_{j,k}`, then `monoidal`.
- Close-path A (preferred): regroup the nested `F‚óÅ(L^i‚óÅ¬∑)` whiskers via `tensor_whiskerLeft`/associator
  so `whisker_exchange` fires on `(Œ≤_ L^i F)‚ñ∑(L^j‚äóL^k)` vs the merge.
- Close-path B: apply `braiding_naturality` to the merge morphism `Tbc.hom ‚â´ Œº_{j,k}` directly (mirror
  of step 1 but for Œ≤_a on the RHS leg).
- Then `(B) moduleSectionAction_coherent` (element-level mirror of B7 `sectionsMul_mul_assoc`) and
  `(C) sectionGradedModule_gmodule` (`DirectSum.Gmodule`, `import Mathlib.Algebra.DirectSum.Module`) are
  mechanical and gated on (A).
- **Abort clock:** iter-034 was (A)'s FIRST real attempt; the cap is ">2 real iters ‚Üí finalize the leg".
  If iter-035 closes step (4) ‚Üí leg proceeds to (B)/(C). If step (4) ALSO stalls ‚Üí that is the 2nd
  iter; one more then ABORT-to-finalize per STRATEGY.
- HARD GATE: chapter `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex` was judged complete+correct+prover-ready by
  lvbc-iter034 (0 must-fix) ‚Üí no re-review needed before dispatching the prover on this file.

## STALE-COMMENT CLEANUP (auditor `iter034`, 7 major ‚Äî none compilation-affecting)
The prover should fix these inside `SectionGradedRing.lean` when it next touches the file (review agent
cannot edit `.lean`). All are docstrings/comments contradicting the now-complete code:
- L60‚Äì63 (module header) + L880‚Äì994 (big `/-‚Ä¶-/` "tensorPowAdd DEFERRED (handoff)" block): `tensorPowAdd`
  is fully built+axiom-clean at L2098. Block is entirely stale ‚Äî delete/rewrite.
- L3436: "GCommSemiring upgrade is invertibility-gated FUTURE work" ‚Äî it is BUILT (`‚Ä¶_gcommSemiring`
  L3991, axiom-clean iter-031).
- L3945‚Äì3950 (also flagged minor by lvbc): in-proof comment claims `tensorPowAdd_comm` still has a
  `sorry` ‚Äî it is closed at L3860 (iter-031).
- L4011 / L4024: docstrings of the 2 new helpers forward-reference `moduleTensorPowAdd_assoc` which is
  not yet in the file (will be true once (A) lands ‚Äî acceptable to keep if (A) lands iter-035).

## COVERAGE DEBT (1-to-1, low priority ‚Äî private infra)
2 new private helpers have no blueprint node:
- `tensorBraiding_naturality_left` (private) ‚Äî iso naturality of `tensorBraiding` arg 1; proof =
  `tensorBraiding_eq` + `tensorObjWhiskerRightIso_eq`/`tensorObjWhiskerLeftIso_eq` +
  `BraidedCategory.braiding_naturality_left_assoc`.
- `tensorBraiding_naturality_right` (private) ‚Äî mirror, arg 2.
Both `private` ‚áí no DAG node strictly required, but doctrine = "when there is Lean there must be tex."
If the iso-level (A) route is ever preferred, blueprint these alongside `def:tensorBraiding`. Otherwise
record as intentional private infra. (Pre-existing 353 `lean_aux` unmatched nodes are dormant/parent
lanes ‚Äî merge-time task, not a blocker.)

## DO NOT RETRY / dead ends
- Do NOT unfold `tensorPowAdd_succ` in (A): keeping `.hom` opaque is what avoids the comp-instance
  diamond. The opaque-atom route is the WORKING one ‚Äî no generic-`M` `_core` needed for the module hexagon.
- Do NOT use `lean_multi_attempt` inside the (A) `have`-rich proof (reports "Unknown identifier"); use
  file edits + `lean_diagnostic_messages`/`lean_goal`.
- 4 œá sorries (`QuotScheme.lean`) ‚Äî KEEP, never re-probe (cohomology leg).

## Blueprint-doctor (out-of-cone, do NOT edit)
All findings on dormant COMPLETE/DEFERRED chapters: `Cohomology_FlatBaseChange.tex` (2 phantom
covers-files + 14 broken refs), `Picard_GlueDescent.tex` (4), `Picard_QuotScheme.tex` (12). Active SGR
chapter is doctor-clean. Merge-time artifacts per ARCHON_MEMORY.
